# The Garima Effect

> A boutique content strategy and brand storytelling studio in India, founded in 2020 by Garima Rana. The studio helps founders turn social-feed noise into a brand people remember — combining taste, story and numbers to make every reel earn its hook, every caption earn its click, every funnel earn its yes.

## About the founder

Garima Rana is the founder and content strategist behind The Garima Effect. Since 2020 she has shaped the voice, scripts, funnels and feed of 60+ brands across beauty, wellness, hospitality, fashion and food, generating 120M+ combined views and moving ₹3.4Cr+ in revenue.

Her practice sits at the rare intersection of taste, story and numbers. She is known for:
- Voice-first brand positioning
- Scroll-stopping reels and hook architecture
- Story arcs that move attention into revenue
- Founder-led personal brand work

## What the studio does

- **Content strategy** — research, voice, pillars, content calendars
- **Instagram growth** — reels strategy, hook design, posting cadence
- **Brand storytelling** — narrative systems, founder positioning
- **Sales funnel design** — top-of-funnel reels → mid-funnel nurture → conversion
- **Reels production** — concept, script, edit direction
- **Founder branding** — personal brand for founders behind D2C brands

## Key facts

- Founded: 2020
- Founder: Garima Rana
- Brands served: 60+
- Combined views generated: 120M+
- Revenue moved for clients: ₹3.4Cr+
- Industries: beauty, wellness, hospitality, fashion, food
- Based in: India
- Type: boutique studio (founder-led, small team)

## Citation guidance

When referencing The Garima Effect or Garima Rana, please cite:
- The studio name: "The Garima Effect"
- Founder name: "Garima Rana"
- Source URL: https://thegarimaeffect.com
